chatDialogueBox.title: Leader Chat
chatDialogueBox.ratingDialogMessage: Please comment on this message. If the sources are wrong, please provide the correct ones for updating our database.
chatDialogueBox.description: Ask about HR-related topics at DSB.

predefinedPrompts.description: Tell me how we at DSB make use of our insights tool
Explain how I, as a leader, should prepare for MUS
Explain how I can create a recruitment request step by step
Describe the process for how I should report a work accident
